summary: Void Security Flow Optimization - All 6 features VERIFIED. Dialog opens directly to reasons for SENT items, auth flow with PIN works correctly, UI states transition properly.
passed_tests: Test 1: SENT items -> Click Anular -> Dialog opens DIRECTLY to REASONS (not PIN) - PASS
Test 2: Select reason WITHOUT auth (Error de digitacion) -> Anular button ENABLED directly - PASS
Test 3: Select reason WITH auth (Botella no abierta) -> Yellow warning + 'Ingresar PIN' button shown - PASS
Test 4: Enter correct PIN (100) -> Green '✓ Verificado' badge + 'Autorizado por: Admin (Superusuario)' - PASS
Test 5: After auth -> Button changes from red 'Anular' to green 'Confirmar Anulación' with check icon - PASS
Test 6: PIN keypad shows 8 circles, prevents leading zero with error 'PIN no puede iniciar con 0' - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: openBulkCancelDialog correctly sets showManagerPin: false to open reasons first
handleReasonSelect properly sets requiresManagerAuth based on reason.requires_manager_auth
verifyManagerPin does NOT auto-submit - waits for user to click Confirmar Anulación
cancelDialog.authorizedBy state properly controls button styling (green when authorized)
PIN validation correctly prevents leading zeros
seed_data_creation: Used existing SENT item (Bohemia) on Table 2 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Void security flow for SENT items is fully functional: 1) Dialog opens to reasons first (not PIN), 2) Reasons with requires_auth=true show yellow warning with 'Ingresar PIN' button, 3) After PIN verification shows green 'Verificado' badge with authorizer name, 4) Button changes to green 'Confirmar Anulación'. PIN keypad enforces 8 digit max and no leading zero.

features_verified.pin_keypad_rules: PASS - 8 digits, no leading zero validation

flow_tested.complete_void_flow: Table 2 -> Select SENT Bohemia -> Click Anular -> Dialog shows reasons -> Select 'Botella no abierta' (auth) -> Yellow warning appears -> Click 'Ingresar PIN' -> Enter 100 -> Click VERIFICAR PIN -> Green verified state -> Confirmar Anulación button green
